description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical Damage. On critical hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. For each [Wound] stack, this skill's damage is increased by 20%, and [(added) you are immune to all damage while casting].
Removes your harmful effects and increases Attack by 205(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by [500->600] for [15sec->10 sec].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. [(removed) The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.]
On critical hit, increases Attack by 40(1+0.3*Skill Level) for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. If [Wound Stacks] is 10, deals additional damage equal to [(added) 150%] of Attack Power.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is changed to increase Critical Damage by [65%->120%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
If there are [(added) 5 or more] stacks, all damage taken is reduced by [(added) 20%]. [(removed) Gain 45 Physical Dodge per stack.]

description.unified: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}% and [(added) upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200]. [(removed) adds 1 Wound per attack.]

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by [7%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: Each time a critical hit occurs, for 15 sec your Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to [8->5] times.
